# ColorModeToggle

A dark/light mode toggle component and associated hooks for managing color mode throughout the application.

## Import

```jsx
import { ColorModeToggle, useColorMode, useColorModeValue } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Exports

| Export | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ColorModeToggle` | Component | A toggle button for switching between light and dark mode. |
| `useColorMode` | Hook | Returns color mode state and control functions. |
| `useColorModeValue` | Hook | Returns a value based on the current color mode. |

## useColorMode

Returns an object with the following properties:

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `colorMode` | `"light" \| "dark"` | The current color mode. |
| `toggleColorMode` | `() => void` | Toggles between light and dark mode. |
| `setColorMode` | `(mode: "light" \| "dark") => void` | Sets the color mode to a specific value. |

## useColorModeValue

```jsx
useColorModeValue(lightValue, darkValue)
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `lightValue` | `any` | The value to return when in light mode. |
| `darkValue` | `any` | The value to return when in dark mode. |

## Usage

### Color Mode Toggle Button

```jsx
<ColorModeToggle />
```

### Using the useColorMode Hook

```jsx
function ColorModeSwitch() {
  const { colorMode, toggleColorMode, setColorMode } = useColorMode();

  return (
    <Box>
      <Text>Current mode: {colorMode}</Text>
      <Button onClick={toggleColorMode}>
        Toggle to {colorMode === "light" ? "dark" : "light"} mode
      </Button>
      <HStack mt="2">
        <Button onClick={() => setColorMode("light")}>Light</Button>
        <Button onClick={() => setColorMode("dark")}>Dark</Button>
      </HStack>
    </Box>
  );
}
```

### Using useColorModeValue

```jsx
function ThemedCard() {
  const bg = useColorModeValue("white", "gray.800");
  const color = useColorModeValue("gray.800", "white");
  const borderColor = useColorModeValue("gray.200", "gray.600");

  return (
    <Box bg={bg} color={color} borderColor={borderColor} borderWidth="1px" p="4" borderRadius="md">
      <Text>This card adapts to the current color mode.</Text>
    </Box>
  );
}
```

### In a Layout Header

```jsx
function Header() {
  return (
    <Flex justify="space-between" align="center" p="4">
      <Heading size="md">My App</Heading>
      <ColorModeToggle />
    </Flex>
  );
}
```
